arts.ttl: 'Chelsea rejected me in the summer - now I'm out to show up Enzo Maresca'
arts.sum: A familiar face returns to Stamford Bridge on Sunday - and he has more reason than most to want to get one over on Enzo Maresca, considering he could have had his job

arts.ttl: Chelsea should now consider selling £39m player who's being linked to Premier League rivals - opinion
arts.sum: He's low in the pecking order.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Brentford Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: A fascinating clash awaits us at Stamford Bridge on December 15th, 19:00 GMT, as Chelsea host Brentford. Can the Blues continue their impressive recent form, or will the Bees pull off another upset ag...

arts.ttl: La Liga outfit looking to raid Chelsea for 21-year-old prodigy
arts.sum: Real Betis are keen on signing the Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei. According to a report from Fichajes, Real Betis are looking to improve their midfield options and they are keen on signing the promising Chelsea youngster. In addition to that, they are keeping tabs on the West Ham United midfielder Guido Rodriguez as well. Casadei […] The post La Liga outfit looking to raid Chelsea for 21-year-old prodigy appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Is Premier League title race between Liverpool and Chelsea?
arts.sum: Final Score's Ellen White and Glenn Murray discuss the latest results in the Premier League and what they mean in the title race for Liverpool, Chelsea and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Chelsea provide Adeyemi answer ahead of January
arts.sum: In particular, their attack has been superb - in 15 games that the Blues have played so far this season, they have scored an incredible 35 goals. But the 22-year-old will not be joining Maresca’s side in the January transfer window, though, according to a new report.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'place out-of-favour duo on loan list' ahead of January market
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly willing to let midfield duo Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall and Carney Chukwuemeka leave Stamford Bridge on loan in January.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea receive shock title race twist as Man City get huge unexpected boost
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea have received the worrying news that Rodri could yet play again for Manchester City this season, despite his cruciate ligament injury having seemingly ended that hope. The Premier League title race for the 2024/25 campaign has been blown wide open amidst Man City's current vein of form.

arts.ttl: Celtic put on Carney Chukwuemeka transfer alert as Chelsea open the door and Champions League foes make change
arts.sum: The former Aston Villa wide man looks certain to leave Stamford Bridge in January alongside another recent signing

arts.ttl: Chelsea drop early team news hint for Brentford match amid Jadon Sancho decision
arts.sum: Chelsea have hinted that Jadon Sancho could start a second straight Premier League match for the Blues when Brentford visit Stamford Bridge on Sunday evening (7pm). After arriving on loan from Manchester United on transfer deadline day, Sancho started the following four league matches before dropping out of the XI and then missing three games through illness.
